since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.28%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.63% · Gold +0.61% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.28%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.28%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +30.22%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +30.22%, AMAT +2.93%, LRCX +2.47%, CGNX +1.96%, KLAC +1.76%. Laggards: DLR -4.04%, TTD -2.63%, HON -1.21%, TSLA -1.03%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.48% at $163.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
